title: lithocardium poliophylla
intro: Lithocardium poliophylla, also known as the Lithospermum poliophyllum, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, commonly referred to as the 'rocky forget-me-not.' The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its diuretic and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Lithocardium poliophylla include reducing the risk of heart disease, alleviating symptoms of hypertension, and promoting overall cardiovascular well-being. Lithocardium poliophylla is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
